languages.text: {n}Эоганн растерянно смотрит на сервочереп у вас в руках, потом за плечо{/n}. "Но... Как же... Нет. Не может быть. Ведь я слышу его". {n}Его губы дрожат, кулаки то сжимаются, то разжимаются. Он выглядит жалко, потерянно. Приложив пальцы к вискам он зажмуривается, мучительно пытаясь что-то вспомнить. Вдруг глаза распахиваются и раздается сдавленный стон. Он ошарашенно смотрит на вас.{/n}

{n}Eogunn looks in confusion at the servo-skull in your hands, then over his shoulder{/n}. "But... How... No. It cannot be. Because I can hear him." {n}His lips quiver, and his fists clench and unclench. He looks pitiful, lost. Pressing his fingers to his temples, he squeezes his eyes shut, straining desperately to remember something. Suddenly, his eyes fly open and you hear a strangled moan. He looks at you, dumbfounded.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn mira confuso el servocráneo que tienes en tus manos, y luego mira por encima de su hombro.{/n} «Pero... Cómo... No. No puede ser. Puedo oírlo». {n}Sus labios tiemblan y aprieta y afloja los puños. Tiene un aspecto patético y perdido. Se lleva los dedos a las sienes, aprieta con fuerza los párpados y se esfuerza por recordar algo. De pronto, abre los ojos de par en par y suelta un gemido ahogado. Te mira patidifuso.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn looks in confusion at the servo-skull in your hands, then over his shoulder{/n}. "But... How... No. It cannot be. He looks at you, dumbfounded.{/n}

Puedo oírlo». {n}Sus labios tiemblan y aprieta y afloja los puños. Tiene un aspecto patético y perdido. Se lleva los dedos a las sienes, aprieta con fuerza los párpados y se esfuerza por recordar algo. De pronto, abre los ojos de par en par y suelta un gemido ahogado. Te mira patidifuso.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡困惑地看了看你手中的伺服头骨，又看向自己肩膀上方。{/n}“可是……怎么……不。不可能。我能听到他说话。”{n}他嘴唇发抖，双拳握紧又松开，看起来既可怜又迷茫。他用手指按住太阳穴，紧闭双眼，拼命想回忆起什么。突然，他猛地睁开眼，发出一声压抑的呻吟。他呆滞地注视着你。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn looks in confusion at the servo-skull in your hands, then over his shoulder{/n}. "But... How... No. It cannot be. Because I can hear him." {n}His lips quiver, and his fists clench and unclench. He looks pitiful, lost. Pressing his fingers to his temples, he squeezes his eyes shut, straining desperately to remember something. Suddenly, his eyes fly open and you hear a strangled moan. He looks at you, dumbfounded.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, qui semble soudain en proie à la plus grande confusion, regarde le servocrâne entre vos mains puis par-dessus son épaule.{/n} « Mais... Comment... Non, c'est impossible, parce que je l'entends. » {n}Les lèvres tremblantes, le technoprêtre serre et desserre les poings. Il a l'air pitoyable, perdu. Pressant ses doigts contre ses tempes, il ferme les yeux, comme s'il cherchait désespérément à se rappeler quelque chose. Un instant plus tard, il les rouvre brusquement, laisse échapper un gémissement étouffé et vous lance un regard abasourdi.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn looks in confusion at the servo-skull in your hands, then over his shoulder{/n}. "But... How... No. It cannot be. Because I can hear him." {n}His lips quiver, and his fists clench and unclench. He looks pitiful, lost. Pressing his fingers to his temples, he squeezes his eyes shut, straining desperately to remember something. Suddenly, his eyes fly open and you hear a strangled moan. He looks at you, dumbfounded.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn önce ellerinde duran hizmelete, sonra da omzunun üzerine kafa karışıklığıyla bakıyor.{/n} "Fakat... Nasıl... Olamaz. Onu duyabiliyorum." {n}Dudakları titriyor, yumrukları sıkılıp açılıyor. Acınası, kaybolmuş görünüyor. Parmaklarını şakaklarına bastırıp gözlerini sıkıca kapatarak çaresizce bir şeyi hatırlamaya çalışıyor. Aniden gözleri ardına kadar açılıyor. Boğuk bir inilti duyuyorsun. Afallamış hâlde sana bakıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn looks in confusion at the servo-skull in your hands, then over his shoulder{/n}. "But... How... No. It cannot be. Pressing his fingers to his temples, he squeezes his eyes shut, straining desperately to remember something. Suddenly, his eyes fly open and you hear a strangled moan. He looks at you, dumbfounded.{/n}

Onu duyabiliyorum." {n}Dudakları titriyor, yumrukları sıkılıp açılıyor. Acınası, kaybolmuş görünüyor. Parmaklarını şakaklarına bastırıp gözlerini sıkıca kapatarak çaresizce bir şeyi hatırlamaya çalışıyor. Aniden gözleri ardına kadar açılıyor. Boğuk bir inilti duyuyorsun. Afallamış hâlde sana bakıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn betrachtet verwirrt den Servoschädel in deinen Händen und wirft einen Blick über seine Schulter{/n}. "Aber ... Wie ... Nein. Das kann nicht sein. Weil ich ihn hören kann." {n}Seine Lippen zittern und er ballt seine Hände zu Fäusten. Er wirkt bemitleidenswert und verloren. Er legt die Finger an seine Schläfen, schließt die Augen und versucht verzweifelt, sich an etwas zu erinnern. Plötzlich reißt er die Augen auf und stößt ein unterdrücktes Stöhnen aus. Er sieht dich sprachlos an.{/n}

Weil ich ihn hören kann." {n}Seine Lippen zittern und er ballt seine Hände zu Fäusten. Er wirkt bemitleidenswert und verloren. Er legt die Finger an seine Schläfen, schließt die Augen und versucht verzweifelt, sich an etwas zu erinnern. Plötzlich reißt er die Augen auf und stößt ein unterdrücktes Stöhnen aus. Er sieht dich sprachlos an.{/n}

languages.text: {n}エオグンはあなたの手にあるサーボ・スカルに困惑し、そして肩越しに見る{/n}。「でも...どうして...そんなはずはない。私には彼の声が聞こえるのだから」。{n}彼の唇は震え、拳は握られたり解かれたりする。情けなく、迷っているように見える。こめかみを指で押さえ、目をぎゅっと閉じ、必死に何かを思い出そうとする。突然、目が開き、苦しそうなうめき声が聞こえる。彼は呆然とあなたを見ている。{/n}

Pressing his fingers to his temples, he squeezes his eyes shut, straining desperately to remember something. Suddenly, his eyes fly open and you hear a strangled moan. He looks at you, dumbfounded.{/n}
